name: Pesapal
description: Pesapal — East Africa payment gateway covering Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, and Rwanda with cards, M-Pesa, Airtel Money, and bank transfers.

seo.title: Pesapal — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Pesapal: Pesapal — East Africa payment gateway covering Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, and Rwanda with cards, M-Pesa, Airtel Money, and bank transfers.

when_to_use: Accepting M-Pesa and Airtel Money for Kenyan e-commerce
Cards and bank transfer checkout for East African merchants
Unified payment page across Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania

pros: Covers KE, UG, TZ, RW in one API
review.verdict: Practical East Africa multi-country gateway, but DX and tooling trail newer regional competitors.
review.best_for: Merchants operating across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, and Rwanda in one integration
review.not_for: Developers expecting modern API patterns and polished dashboards
